title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: A YouTuber discusses the withdrawal of Claude Fable 5 after a three-day public launch, citing US government export-control directives and alleged jailbreak concerns. The video covers the regulatory event, model performance benchmarks relative to Claude Opus, and implications for developers building on these models.
writeup: Cole Medin covers the withdrawal of Claude Fable 5 three days after its public launch, attributing the pullback to US government export-control directives and alleged jailbreak concerns. The video walks through the regulatory event, the model's performance benchmarks relative to Claude Opus, and what the removal means for developers building on these models. The core takeaways: a model can be pulled shortly after release on safety and export-control grounds, and benchmark standing does not insulate a product from regulatory action.
